hero.lede: Explore how the world's leading brands use data, technology, and human insight to create experiences that inspire loyalty, trust, and growth.

episodes.title: Branding Excellence
episodes.description: Crafting identities that stand out and connect with purpose.

episodes.title: Digital Innovation
episodes.description: Designing seamless digital experiences that inspire action.

episodes.title: Creative Impact
episodes.description: Transforming ideas into designs that leave a lasting impression.

articles.title: Channels Are Delivery Mechanisms. Journeys Are the Product.
articles.excerpt: Customers don't wake up wanting to use a channel, they have a job to be done. A reflection on my conversation with Sasha Zablotskyi of Openbank on journey-centricity, org design, and why AI is accelerating the death of channels.

host.name: Dr Eslam Afifi
host.bio1: Hello, I'm Dr Eslam Afifi - a CX and data leader with over 15 years of experience helping organizations across Australia, Europe, and the GCC. I've learned that great experiences don't come from one element alone: they're created through the right Algorithm of people, data, and technology.
host.bio2: I created The CX Algorithm to bring together diverse voices - innovators, leaders, and storytellers - who each add something unique to the formula. Because when we listen, share, and collaborate, we uncover the real intelligence behind extraordinary customer experiences.
